findings.title: CVE-2026-33032 — nginx-ui MCP Authentication Bypass Enables Full Nginx Server Takeover
findings.summary: Unprotected MCP endpoint in nginx-ui allows unauthenticated attackers to invoke all management tools including config injection and service reload, with 2,600 exposed instances under active exploitation.

findings.title: CVE-2026-34197 — Apache ActiveMQ Jolokia API Remote Code Execution Added to CISA KEV
findings.summary: A 13-year-old code injection flaw in ActiveMQ's Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge enables arbitrary command execution via crafted discovery URIs and is now actively exploited in the wild.

findings.title: Microsoft April 2026 Patch Tuesday — CVE-2026-33824 Windows IKE Unauthenticated RCE and SharePoint Zero-Day in KEV
findings.summary: Microsoft's 169-vulnerability Patch Tuesday includes an unauthenticated RCE in Windows IKE v2 (CVSS 9.8) affecting VPN/IPsec endpoints and an actively exploited SharePoint spoofing zero-day added to CISA KEV.

findings.title: CVE-2026-39987 UPDATE — Marimo RCE Weaponized with NKAbuse Malware Deployed from Hugging Face Spaces
findings.summary: Exploitation of the Marimo WebSocket RCE occurred within 10 hours of disclosure, with attackers now deploying NKAbuse malware variants hosted on Hugging Face Spaces as C2 infrastructure.

findings.title: CVE-2026-27681 — SAP Business Planning and Consolidation SQL Injection
findings.affected_technology: SAP Business Planning and Consolidation (BPC), SAP Business Warehouse
findings.summary: Low-privileged SAP users can upload files containing arbitrary SQL statements for execution against data stores, enabling complete data theft and corruption across SAP environments.

findings.title: Cisco ISE and Webex Services — Four Critical Flaws Enable User Impersonation and RCE
findings.affected_technology: Cisco Identity Services Engine (ISE), Cisco Webex Services
findings.summary: Four critical vulnerabilities in Cisco ISE and Webex (CVSS 9.8-9.9) enable user impersonation via certificate validation bypass and remote code execution through crafted HTTP requests.

findings.title: WordPress EssentialPlugin Supply Chain Attack — 30+ Plugins Backdoored with Ethereum C2
findings.summary: A dormant backdoor planted after the EssentialPlugin suite acquisition in August 2025 has been activated, pushing malware via updates to thousands of WordPress sites using Ethereum-based C2 resolution.

findings.title: CVE-2025-0520 — ShowDoc Unrestricted File Upload RCE Under Active Exploitation
findings.summary: An unrestricted file upload vulnerability in ShowDoc allows unauthenticated attackers to upload and execute arbitrary PHP files, with exploitation now confirmed on unpatched servers in the wild.

findings.title: CVE-2026-33825 UPDATE — Microsoft Defender BlueHammer Privilege Escalation — Public PoC and Zero-Day Status
findings.summary: Previously noted as BlueHammer, now assigned CVE-2026-33825 with a public GitHub exploit enabling SYSTEM-level privilege escalation via Volume Shadow Copy abuse in the Defender update process.

findings.title: CVE-2026-40176, CVE-2026-40261 — PHP Composer Command Injection via Malicious Repository Configs
findings.summary: Two command injection flaws in Composer's Perforce VCS driver allow arbitrary command execution via crafted composer.json files even without Perforce installed, fixed in versions 2.9.6 and 2.2.27.

noted.summary: ICS/SCADA malware targeting water treatment and desalination via Modbus/DNP3/S7comm; currently non-functional due to encryption code bug but serious future OT threat.
Local privilege escalation via link following added to CISA KEV on April 13; patched November 2025, now confirmed actively exploited.
Broken access control in Open WebUI < v0.8.11 disclosed via Full Disclosure mailing list.
Multiple vulnerabilities in industrial control equipment fixed in V26.10; ICS/OT context.
New AI-powered voice phishing platform using automated voice agents for credential harvesting at scale.
Over 100 malicious Chrome extensions discovered stealing OAuth2 tokens, deploying backdoors, and conducting ad fraud.
SecurityWeek reports on a by-design flaw allowing unsanitized command execution across AI environments; research-stage, no CVE.
Authenticated RCE via deserialization in legacy Velocity/Commons Collections libraries (CVSS 9.0); niche deployment.
